posts.title: Startup Ecosystem—the Big Picture
posts.summary: Startup Ecosystem—the Big Picture: “Leave me alone. I just need to perfect this product and get it to market, or I’ll run out of money. I don’t need systems and big pictures!” The problem is that each of us is part of the system, and if we don’t take account of the big picture we […] The post Startup Ecosystem—the Big Picture appeared first on Venture Founders .
posts.author: Will Keyser
